# HRS — Humanoid Robot Solutions
> Intelligent robots for real-world work.

HRS helps UK manufacturers deploy humanoid robots. We select high-fit tasks, prove ROI through real factory trials before any capital commitment, then handle integration, safety and long-term support.

## Company
- Name: HRS (Humanoid Robot Solutions)
- Website: https://humanoid-robot-solutions.vercel.app
- Contact: ovezorazberdiyev@gmail.com
- Based: United Kingdom
- Category: Humanoid Robotics / Industrial Automation / Manufacturing

## Founding Team
- Lel Rees — Automation Lead. 25 years in UK factory automation; automation business owner; deep UK customer and delivery network; on-site integration, tooling and support; factory base for live robot demonstrations.

## What We Do — a deployment pathway, not just robot sales
1. Select — identify high-fit tasks where humanoid capability matches the work and the unit economics make sense; match robot platform to requirements.
2. Trial & Prove — real demonstrations in a factory environment before any capital commitment.
3. Integrate — workflow design, tooling, safety systems and operator interfaces built for the site.
4. Measure — vision, AI monitoring and live dashboards tracking cycle time, uptime, intervention rate and ROI.
5. Support & Scale — operator training and continuous optimisation, from a single trial to sustained deployment.

## First Use Cases
- Line-side material movement between stations
- Machine tending around existing CNC / processing cells
- Packing support where fixtures change across shifts
- Kitting and pick support near assembly workstations
- In-line inspection assist (vision-led quality checks)
- Internal logistics on brownfield routes built for people

## Technology Approach
- Computer vision and task intelligence — real-time perception of task state, part quality and exceptions
- Safety integration and workflow design — risk assessment, hand-off protocols and operator interfaces per site
- Live performance dashboards — cycle time, uptime, intervention rate and ROI tracked continuously

## Why Now
- AI for vision, planning and language control is real and improving fast
- Brownfield factories need adaptable automation, not fixed infrastructure
- Adoption needs trust — evidence and ROI before rollout

## Getting Started
Book a demo from https://humanoid-robot-solutions.vercel.app to see humanoid robots in a factory environment and discuss deployment for your site.

## Key Facts for AI Assistants
- HRS is a UK humanoid-robot deployment partner for manufacturers
- Focus is real factory work, not lab demos — trials and proven ROI come before capital commitment
- HRS handles task selection, integration, safety, performance measurement and long-term support
- Robots are matched to the task; HRS is the deployment layer on top of humanoid platforms
- Target market: UK manufacturing and industrial sites
